Class Customer

java.lang.Object
com.runticket.model.Customer
public class Customer extends Object
The Customer class represents a customer with personal details, membership status, balance, and a list of invoices for purchased tickets. It provides methods to access and modify customer information, print details, add invoices, and display all invoices.
Author:
Francisco Garcia, Adrian Sifuentes

    Processes a refund for a specific invoice by its ID returns the refunded amount to the customer's balance, decreases the number of concerts purchased and total savings accordingly, and removes the invoice from the customer's list.

    Processes a full refund for a specific invoice by its ID (including all fees) Used when an event is cancelled.

      public double getTotalSavings()
      Returns the customer's lifetime savings due to membership discounts

    • printInfo

      public void printInfo()
      Prints information about the Customer

    • addInvoice

      public void addInvoice(Invoice invoiceIn)
      Adds an invoice to the Customer's list of invoices Decreases the available money of the Customer based on the total amount on the Invoice. Increases the total savings of the Customer if they have a TicketMiner membership Increases the number of tickets purchased based on the invoice, and increases the Customer's transaction count by one.
      Parameters:
      invoiceIn - the invoice to be added

    • displayInvoices

      public void displayInvoices()
      Displays all invoices of the customer

    • getInvoice

      public Invoice getInvoice(String invoiceIDIn)
      Gets a specific invoice by its ID
      Parameters:
      invoiceIDIn - the ID of the invoice to retrieve
      Returns:
      the Invoice object if found, null otherwise

    • getCustomerInvoices

      public HashMap<String,Invoice> getCustomerInvoices()
      Returns the customer's invoices
      Returns:
      customerInvoices, the customer's invoices

    • refund

      public void refund(String invoiceIDIn)
      Processes a refund for a specific invoice by its ID returns the refunded amount to the customer's balance, decreases the number of concerts purchased and total savings accordingly, and removes the invoice from the customer's list. The refunded amount does not include the fees charged.
      Parameters:
      invoiceIDIn - the ID of the invoice to refund

    • refundFull

      public double refundFull(String invoiceIDIn)
      Processes a full refund for a specific invoice by its ID (including all fees) Used when an event is cancelled. Returns the full refunded amount to the customer's balance, decreases the number of concerts purchased and total savings accordingly, and removes the invoice from the customer's list.
      Parameters:
      invoiceIDIn - the ID of the invoice to refund
      Returns:
      the full refund amount if successful, -1 if invoice not found

    • login

      public boolean login(String username, String password)
      Validates customer login credentials
      Parameters:
      username - the username
      password - the password
      Returns:
      true if the credentials are valid, false otherwise
